name: the-art-of-deception-controlling-the-human-element-of-security
description: Kevin Mitnick's guide to social engineering — the art of manipulating people, not computers, to breach security. Real case studies of pretexting, phishing, tailgating, and the best defenses.
useCase: Understand social engineering attacks and defenses — how psychological manipulation, not technical hacking, is the biggest security threat.
knownRisks: Case studies are from early 2000s — techniques have evolved
Some practical examples could be used for harm (educational use only)
